name: S&P 500 Watcher

cards.name: S&P 500
cards.interpretation_en: S&P 500 rose 0.89% today; over the past month it is roughly flat (+0.1%).

cards.interpretation_en: SPDR S&P 500 ETF rose 0.83% today; over the past month it is roughly flat (+0.2%).
cards.interpretation_ko: SPDR S&P 500 ETF 오늘 0.83% 상승 · 최근 1개월은 횡보(+0.2%)입니다.

cards.name: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight
cards.interpretation_en: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight rose 0.16% today; over the past month it is up (+1.3%).
cards.interpretation_ko: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight 오늘 0.16% 상승 · 최근 1개월은 상승세(+1.3%)입니다.

diagnosis_en: S&P 500 Watcher: the index is above its 200-day moving average, so the primary trend is still up. Momentum is 0.49% over 1 month and 5.64% over 3 months, with RSI 53 in a neutral range. It sits 1.3% below its 52-week high. The 200-day line is the key level to watch — losing it would flip the primary trend. Equal-weight (RSP) is keeping pace: participation is broad.
diagnosis_ko: S&P 500 Watcher: 지수는 200일 이동평균선 위에 있어 1차 추세는 상승입니다. 모멘텀은 1개월 0.49%, 3개월 5.64%, RSI 53는 중립 구간입니다. 현재가는 52주 고점 대비 1.3% 아래입니다. 200일선이 핵심 분기점으로, 이 선을 내주면 1차 추세가 전환됩니다. 동일가중(RSP)이 보조를 맞춤: 참여가 광범위합니다.
